basic_details.job_title: AAI Recruitment 2025 - Apply Online for 03 Consultant, Junior Consultant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Airports Authority of India (AAI) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 03 Consultant, Junior Consultant Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official AAI website. The last date to submit the application form is 16-10-2025. In this article, you’ll find the AAI Consultant, Junior Consultant Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Online application form.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 03-10-2025 Last Date for Apply Online: 16-10-2025

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for Consultant: 40 Years Maximum Age limit for Jr. Consultant: 35 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in engineering / Technology in Electronics/Electronics & Communication/ Electronics and Instrumentation.
